generated_agent.diagnosis: The previous candidate was serialized with literal backslash-n sequences as file text instead of real newlines, causing the entire Python source to appear on line 1 and fail syntax validation. The repaired candidate is a complete, self-contained Python file with normal line structure after JSON decoding.
generated_agent.expected_improvement: Validation should pass because the candidate is syntactically normal Python after JSON decoding, avoids unsafe operations, and preserves the required interface while retaining bounded tactical move selection.
risk_notes: Self-contained parsing may be less specialized than arena helper parsers for unusual observation shapes, but it supports chess.Board, dict/object fen/board/position fields, and raw FEN strings.
The agent is shallow and deterministic; it can still miss multi-move tactics under tight time limits.
If output_format requests a nonstandard format other than san/algebraic, the agent returns UCI.
strategy_changes: Replaced dependency on local tools helpers with self-contained observation parsing, move formatting, and move validation using python-chess only.
Kept deterministic shallow tactical scoring with immediate mate detection, capture valuation, promotion bonuses, development heuristics, and bounded opponent reply danger.
Added robust legal fallback: every selected move is checked against board.legal_moves before formatting.
Kept runtime bounded by a time guard and reply scan limits.
generated_agent.summary: Generated next-round agent with OpenAI LLM backend.

improvement_summary: No critical failure detected; make a small validated strategy improvement.
